listing_description: Sample listing note: city-centre 2-bedder near Marina Bay with efficient layout, strong tenant appeal, and good access to CBD offices. Check quantum against recent similar-size transactions before shortlisting.
Sample listing note: integrated-development unit near Downtown MRT and Marina Bay. Attractive for professional tenants, but high absolute quantum means yield should be checked carefully.
Sample listing note: waterfront project with larger-format layout and resort-style facilities. Consider maintenance cost, project liquidity, and comparison against nearby HarbourFront transactions.
Sample listing note: distinctive large development with greenery and broad facilities. Good lifestyle appeal, but compare stack, orientation, and travel time to MRT before ranking.
Sample listing note: District 10 project near Farrer Road with broad tenant pool and many comparable transactions. Useful candidate for testing PSF versus recent resale data.
Sample listing note: freehold District 10 unit with larger floor area. Investment case may rely more on capital preservation than yield, so compare against leasehold alternatives.
Sample listing note: newer Queenstown-area 2-bedder with strong rental catchment and city-fringe location. Check whether asking PSF is supported by recent project transactions.
Sample listing note: compact city-fringe unit near MRT. Potentially efficient for rental yield, but size and layout should be checked for own-stay comfort.
Sample listing note: newer project near Eunos with convenient transport access. Good for testing rental-yield screening against a lower quantum city-fringe option.
Sample listing note: East Coast project near upcoming/nearby rail connectivity and lifestyle amenities. Consider tenant demand, sea-facing premium, and leasehold entry price.
Sample listing note: freehold new-generation East Coast project. Strong lifestyle appeal, but rental yield may be compressed by freehold premium and high quantum.
Sample listing note: Bishan project near MRT/interchange and shopping amenities. Useful for testing mature-town demand, compact layouts, and rental resilience.
Sample listing note: larger suburban 2-bedder with full condo facilities. Lower PSF may be attractive, but transport access and tenant depth should be compared.
Sample listing note: Jurong East project close to commercial hub and transport nodes. Good candidate for testing regional-centre rental assumptions and resale liquidity.
Sample listing note: city-fringe project near Boon Keng/Kallang area with relatively accessible quantum. Compare against nearby rental contracts and recent resale caveats.
